Regulation of transfers and discharge of government duties of Maharashtra Government employees.
Subs. pursuant to the provisions of sections 4 (4) and 4 (5) of the Prevention of Delay Act, 2005

Unilateral discharge from the present working post from 25.06.2026 (M.No.).

Disciplinary action shall be taken in accordance with the provisions of the Services (Conduct) Rules, 1979.
